Essay: I thought Putin=E2=80=99s Miscalculation [https://email.mg2.substack=
=2Ecom/c/eJxFUcuO4yAQ_JpwM7J5OPjAYS77GxaG=
jsOG1_CIlf36IbFGKzVNi65SiSqtKuwxv2SK=

OCv9FfwB12qom], a Politico piece by Zoya Sheftalovich, was excellent for a =
view on Putin=E2=80=99s old school approach.=C2=A0
Finally, an optimistic closing thought.=C2=A0
While the fact that the war started at all shows that there is real evil in=
 the world, the response to it has been a reminder that most people in the =
world are good. It=E2=80=99s easy to forget when things are relatively comf=
ortable and people get bored and squabble over petty things, but it=E2=80=
=99s been amazing watching both the unbelievable bravery of President Zelen=
sky [https://email.mg2.substack.com/c/eJxFkE2OgzAMhU_TLFF-aVhkMZveYDazQSExN=
CokNDGtmNNPKIuRLFuWZT-_z1mEKeXdrKkgOVKP-womwrvMgAiZbAVyH7xhLddCyY54Iz3TSpNQ=
-jEDLDbMBvMGZN2GOTiLIcXPBqVckbsRrhOdG9k4jpZzRxnnLRuksJ1UrWbdqWs3HyA6MPCCvKc=
IZDZ3xLVcxNeF32rgOxwfNS4ttfuBGWJ57Pu3JcFwyo_QTKgrFQ1vRq-07NTAfQsgmG6eTi3PX_=
u6SLpMvCnbUNC6x3GNZBMTDimHONXx424XmD-D6qivddliwL2HaIcZ_GkWT2Yf-_0EEXJl6XuLl=
ZRsqWpbIa5anuYqDdlJrQ9-VdmnuhX_Rf8AG_KEEA] and the Ukrainian people, and th=
e almost unanimous global support of the Ukrainians. I=E2=80=99ve also been=
 impressed that the global online mobs have been quick to condemn Putin wit=
hout blaming the Russian people, many of whom are doing what they can to su=
pport Ukrainians.=C2=A0
Specifically related to the topics we cover here normally =E2=80=93 tech an=
d web3 =E2=80=93 there have been a few =E2=80=9Cwow=E2=80=9D moments.=C2=A0
One was the official Ukrainian twitter account requesting, and receiving, d=
onations in BTC and ETH.=C2=A0
It=E2=80=99s been fascinating to watch how easy it=E2=80=99s been for the w=
orld=E2=80=99s nations to shut the bad guy out of the financial system and =
how easy it=E2=80=99s been for the good guys to raise money from anyone, an=
ywhere in the world instantly.=C2=A0
That said, I hope that in the next few days, the Ukraine addresses and Ukra=
ineDAO [https://email.mg2.substack.com/c/eJxFkNFuwyAMRb-mPEYEcCAPPGxq9xsRBK=
dFSyAlpFn29aPJwyTLV7Z1deXTm4z3mHY9xyWTd-vyPqMOuC0j5oyJrAumzjtdN0xxEC1xWrhag=
SJ-6YaEOBk_6pxWJPNqR9-b7GM4HJQyIA9tGbcoZCMb1SiGFlAIhcbVIIyCgZ-5ZnUeQ48aX5j2=
GJCM-pHzvFz4x4V9ldq2rZpNyrv1rjLzXFbHWJT-CKBK0PrTXFHW5iZhuEnat3JAUHCVXAytBKC=
MeM0oe5eqOUjKK1YNDpRowTLXIPJaVc8epueveV0Ene6sWla7ZNN_V32cSNIhZhuTD_dy_n6YCc=
fjUL7vik5r8HnvMBg7ojvB5JPvgaq7Y8BUuLvO5EJVNBSahnOpxAmikBOtUOrNuiS7WFzhP_QPI=
wKPJQ] are able to raise a lot more money than they have so far. If we were=
 able to raise $47 million to try to buy a symbol of democracy, we should b=
e able to raise multiples of that to support a small country fighting to de=
fend democracy against an autocratic giant. So give: here [https://email.mg=

The second has been Elon=E2=80=99s impact.=C2=A0
On Thursday, Russia=E2=80=99s space agency chief threatened rival countries=
, asking =E2=80=9CWho will save the ISS from an uncontrolled deorbit and fa=
ll into the United States or Europe?=E2=80=9D
Elon responded the next day:=C2=A0
Then on Saturday, when the Vice Prime Minister and Minister of Digital Tran=
sformation of Ukraine, Mykhailo Fedorov, tweeted at Elon asking him to prov=
ide Starlink service, Elon responded in under 11 hours that it was live:=C2=
=A0
It=E2=80=99s unbelievable that a private citizen is able to marshall govern=
ment-scale resources and tweet about it all in real-time. This war is going=
 to be a wake up call. Instead of mocking Elon, we need leaders who will en=
courage a thousand more Elons. First up: we need a nuclear power Elon.=C2=
=A0
The third thing that makes me optimistic is that social media gave a platfo=
rm for President Zelensky and the Ukrainian people to display their bravery=
 and rally support in real-time.=C2=A0
With everything moving so quickly, the ability to marshall global support i=
n minutes can=E2=80=99t be overestimated. Social media is called a mirror o=
n humanity =E2=80=93 and we often don=E2=80=99t like what we see =E2=80=93 =
but I=E2=80=99ve been really inspired watching most people in the world ral=
ly behind the good guy instead of the troll when it really matters.=C2=A0
In Sc3nius [https://email.mg2.substack.com/c/eJxFkNuKwyAQQL8mPgbjJbEPPiws_Q=
3xMk2liaZeGrJfv7aBXZhRmHE8zLG6wBzTIbeYC3ofqhwbyAB7XqAUSKhmSMo7OYxEUM4uyEnmB=
sEF8lndEsCq_SJLqoC2ahZvdfExfCYwJhzdJSbCOsEZtthNQuDBGD0SPmFHHL9N5uTq6jwECxJe=
kI4YAC3yXsqWO_rVkWuLfd_7EIuJyYe5t7GVtpbZ0uBre3atZVU51mSho981LchLgsk7xEAbj_a=
kvzku2IUb4kYAOoj-afn6_NGvjuF1Jn2uJhdtH-3_FSX5x2vtx12vsHwabVPV7rUGXw4FQZsF3C=
mhnC4_WtQMAVJz7JQuzSAbMR9HSifBzqWbJXZhQry9NrKLbSr8Q38BASeMQg], I wrote that=
 emergence from catastrophe was one of the necessary precursors to the kind=
 of collective genius that pushes the world forward. COVID was one such kic=
k, and it spurred a ton of progress in the world of bits. I think that this=
 invasion will have a similar effect on atoms-based innovation. Already, Ge=
rmany has increased its defense budget to 2% of GDP, the world has woken up=
 to the importance of energy independence, and politicians who obstruct pro=
gress in the name of partisanship won=E2=80=99t be viewed kindly.=C2=A0
For now, though, this war is far from over. As Putin=E2=80=99s grip on powe=
r slips, he becomes even more dangerous. If you haven=E2=80=99t yet and you=
 can, I=E2=80=99d encourage you to give or contribute in some way.=C2=A0
I=E2=80=99m optimistic that the past four days have helped people re-discov=
er that most other people are good, that there=E2=80=99s real value in tech=
nological superiority, and that while the internet can be a weird place, it=
 can also rally support behind heroes at lightning speed.=C2=A0
Glory to Ukraine.
Thanks for reading, and see you next week,
Packy
